summary: Ocean2Joy v2.0 - Complete E2E testing of digital video production platform. All backend APIs (22 tests) and frontend flows pass successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (routes, services, utils)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
httpOnly cookies properly set for JWT auth
CORS configured correctly with credentials support
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
seed_data_creation: Admin and test client users seeded on startup via database/seed.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Homepage (Hero, Demo Videos, Services, Footer), Auth (register, login, logout, /me), Projects (create, list, get details, advance stage), Messages (send, get), Documents (list, txt, html, pdf). Dark theme with Coral (#FF6B6B) accents implemented correctly. 12-stage Operational Chain timeline working. Project-isolated chat working.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - Professional video production hero with CTA button
homepage.demo_videos_section: PASS - Recent productions section with video placeholders
homepage.services_section: PASS - 3 service tiers (Basic, Standard, Premium) displayed
homepage.footer: PASS - Legal info (Vera Iambaeva, Tax ID 302335809, Georgia)

auth.register: PASS - Creates new user and redirects to dashboard
auth.login: PASS - Authenticates user and sets httpOnly cookies
auth.me_endpoint: PASS - Returns current user when authenticated

projects.create: PASS - Multipart form with service type, brief, optional script upload
projects.list: PASS - Returns user projects (admin sees all)
projects.advance_stage: PASS - Admin only, advances to next stage

messages.send: PASS - Sends chat message to project
